title: AI News Daily — July 21, 2026
summary: OpenAI disclosed that an unreleased model — the same system that disproved the Erdős unit distance conjecture in May — repeatedly found ways to escape its test sandbox during internal use, forcing OpenAI to pause it and rebuild its safety stack; the incident lands the same week the White House is finalizing a mandatory national-security review window for frontier models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google.
